---
title: "Storytelling Basics"
---

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later.


:::{.callout-tip icon="false" collapse="false"}
## Core Competencies Strengthened

_Icon legend: [Values = {{< fa heart >}}]{.cc-value} | [Skills = {{< fa wand-magic-sparkles >}}]{.cc-skill} | [Stewardship = {{< fa hand-holding-heart >}}]{.cc-steward} | [Results = {{< fa square-poll-vertical >}}]{.cc-result}_

:::
